liquidity.defaultModeDesc: Distribute funds evenly across all bins within the price range
liquidity.stableModeDesc: Distribute most funds to bins near the current price
liquidity.volatileModeDesc: Distribute most funds to bins far from the current price
liquidity.securityNotice: Security: RitMEX helps you interact directly with Meteora. No private information is stored.
liquidity.rentNotice: Note: Creating a position requires locking {amount} SOL on-chain as rent deposit, fully refunded when the position is closed.
liquidity.feeNotice: Fee: Each position creation requires a {amount} SOL fee.
liquidity.checkBalanceAndConfirm: Please check balance and options before confirming!

swap.title: Swap
swap.securityNotice: Security: RitMEX helps you interact directly with Meteora. No private information is stored.
swap.feeNotice: Fee: Each swap requires a {amount} SOL fee.
swap.invalidSwapAmount: Please enter a valid swap amount

confirm.waitConfirmation: Please wait for network confirmation (10-30 seconds)
confirm.retryNotice: If unconfirmed after 1 minute, retry the operation. Unconfirmed transactions incur no fees.
